title: Smoke-test R1 Neo power-hold GPIO timing
description: Discovered while creating project-LICHEN-ev5b.4. The board DTS drives DCDC_EN_HOLD P0.13, NRF_ON/SOFT_SHUTDOWN P0.29, and LoRa POWER_EN P1.05 as GPIO hogs. Validate that these assert early enough for stable boot/radio bring-up and that their active levels match real R1 Neo hardware.
